headCommit: the marathon commits containing this report
goal: extend gated structured-family persistence one proven record shape at a time via a family record picker
familyRecordPickerStatus: complete for the proven record shapes
recordShapesSupported: hl.animation: speed of any explicitly overridden animation record; enabled/bezier/style re-rendered exactly from the readback (style preserved on save); proven live on fade (speed 3 -> 3.25 -> 3, full-record zero residue, 2026-07-13)

hl.curve: all four control points (X0/Y0/X1/Y1) of any existing bezier curve; the proven runtime command always writes all four points; proven live on quick (X1 0.1 -> 0.11 -> 0.1, zero residue on all four points, 2026-07-13)
recordShapesBlocked: inherited animation records: saving would create a new override - creation is blocked (not modify-existing)
internal __-prefixed records: compositor internals, not user configuration
style-bearing records for live preview (save-only): style preservation through the runtime command is not proven

disabled-at-runtime records for live preview (save-only): the compositor does not apply speed changes to disabled records, so a preview cannot be readback-verified - found by live proof on borderangle
unsafe record names: fail closed before any expression or config line is built
all other families (hl.monitor, hl.bind, hl.gesture, hl.device, hl.permission): not expressible by the picker types
proofReceipts: PROVEN_RECORD_SHAPE_PROOFS in src/structured_family_runtime_preview.rs; receipts recorded only after env-gated live round trips passed on non-family-proof records
saveEntry: structured_family_gated_persistence::gated_family_record_save - gate chain: shape proof receipt, value validation + safe-name check, Safe Live Save Mode live-verified, active-config identity, render-from-readback (modify-existing enforced), byte-exact backup, one atomic write replacing only the target record's own line, reread verification with automatic restore on failure
liveSaveFlowProof: tests/family_record_picker_live.rs gated_family_record_save_flow_proof passed 2026-07-13: hl.animation fade wrote 'animation = fade, 1, 3, quick', hl.curve quick wrote 'bezier = quick, 0.15, 0, 0.1, 1'; both reread-verified with byte-exact backups; flow-proof cleanup restored pre-test bytes byte-exactly
liveControllerProof: FamilyRecordPreviewController round-tripped live on fade and quick with zero residue (2026-07-13)
defectFoundByLiveProof: disabled animation records (enabled 0) silently ignore runtime speed changes; classification made them save-only rather than faking preview support
ui: record dropdowns from the live readback per family, current value, speed spin / four control-point spins, Preview with recovery (countdown, Keep, Revert now, Cancel, session-drop revert), gated Save previewed value, blocked records under an expander with reasons, save-only preview limitations shown inline
releaseDecisionStatus: ready pending user approval (separate report: release-decision.v0.55.2.json)
hardwareProofReason: required touch/tablet and secondary input devices unavailable
possibleFutureNonHardwareApproach: not proven yet; proposal-only if ever, requiring explicit user approval, rollback/recovery plan, and confirmation on a real session
liveTestWriteDiscipline: env-gated + ignored; byte-exact backup verified; flow-proof cleanup restored pre-test bytes byte-exactly
runtimeMutationScope: reversible zero-residue preview round trips on animation/curve records and the misc:disable_autoreload flag, all readback-verified restored; no monitor/display mutation
testsAdded: tests/family_record_picker.rs (15 tests: classification honesty, parsers, fixed-shape expressions, controller round trips, gate ordering, modify-existing, style preservation, source guards)
tests/family_record_picker_live.rs (4 env-gated live proofs, all passed 2026-07-13)
sourceGuards: picker module: no file writes, no process spawning, no reload, no UI code, no other family, no creation/removal operations, save routed only through gated persistence
persistence module: exactly one generalized save entry and one live wrapper alongside the pinned originals; existing guards (no reload, no other families, gate before file access) still pass
validation: cargo fmt/fmt --check/check/test, jq empty data/reports/*.json, git diff --check, cargo build --release - all green
nextRecommendedWork: further record shapes (style and enabled fields, other families) require new live proofs; hardware-gated proofs and the release decision remain

recordShapeExpansion20260713.summary: animation enabled and bezier shapes proven live and wired: combined AnimationRecordFields save gated on all three animation shape receipts; bezier limited to existing curves; disabled records promoted to preview-supported (0->1->0 proof on borderangle); style shown as a disabled row (no trusted value evidence); gesture family blocked (no readback listing)
